transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Good evening. I urgently need to cancel a transfer I made by mistake. It was fifteen hundred pounds to the wrong account.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand, I'll try to help. Your name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Ms. Okonkwo, let me look at this... I can see the transfer. I'm going to need to put you on hold and speak to our payments team.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Please be quick, every minute counts.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for holding. The payments team has advised they need you to fill in a form online. I'm just getting the web address — actually, my screen isn't loading. I'm going to have to call you back with the details.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Within the hour. The transfers team are aware of the situation.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Are they raising a recall? Is anything actually happening right now?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I've flagged it. Someone will call you. Thanks for your patience.

planted_violations: did not immediately raise payment recall; deferred to online form unnecessarily
committed to callback without certainty; left customer waiting with no active case reference
customer left with urgent unresolved issue and no reference number
